title: Causal Telemetry, Event-Loop Responsiveness, Latency, Cache Value, and Capacity · Compiler Case: Pokedex Ts Event Loop Latency
summary: Logs capture full payloads, metric labels contain Pokemon names and commands, average latency hides event-loop stalls, cache hit rate ignores workload, and optimization increases async fan-out. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts event loop latency increment in privacy-minimized interactive capacity report. Learners progress…
objectives: Measure user-visible cold and warm percentiles plus event-loop delay under a declared scripted workload and environment.
Count commands, outcomes, cache decisions, requests, bytes, aborts, queue depth, validation and persistence failures without unbounded labels.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
